title: How do I take a test using Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor?
plain_text: Access secure online exams at Northeastern with Respondus LockDown Browser. Complete guide for download, setup, and troubleshooting on PC, Mac, iPad. Some courses require the use of a LockDown Browser alone or a LockDown Browser and a webcam for online tests and exams. The webcam can be the type that's built into the computer or one that plugs in with a USB cable. Students will need to download the LockDown Browser software to take these tests and exams. When you use LockDown Browser to access a quiz, you are unable to print, copy, visit other websites, access other applications, or close a quiz until it is submitted for grading. Quizzes created for use with LockDown Browser cannot be accessed with standard browsers. Note: If you are currently taking a quiz Respondus LockDown Browser and are experiencing issues, review the FAQ: Solutions for students experiencing technical problems during online exams. Watch this brief video Introduction to Respondus LockDown Browser for Students to get a basic understanding of LockDown Browser and the webcam feature. Technical requirements: If your instructor requires Respondus Monitor, you will need a video camera and microphone enabled on your computer. Respondus runs on the following operating systems: Windows: 11 and 10. Note: Windows 10/11 'S mode' is not a compatible operating system. Mac: macOS 10.15 to 14.0+. iPadOS: 12.0+ (iPad only). ChromeOS: LockDown Browser for Chromebook minimally requires the version of ChromeOS that Google makes available via their Long Term Support (LTS) channel.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Access secure online exams at Northeastern with Respondus LockDown Browser. Complete guide for download, setup, and troubleshooting on PC, Mac, iPad. Some courses require the use of a LockDown Browser alone or a LockDown Browser and a webcam for online tests and exams.;Table of contents: Technical requirements; Download Respondus LockDown Browser; Download the Respondus LockDown Browser app for iPad; Take the Respondus Tech Check Quiz; Take the test on a computer; Take the test on an iPad; Guidelines; Help.;Technical requirements: If your instructor requires Respondus Monitor, you will need a video camera and microphone enabled on your computer. Respondus runs on the following operating systems: Windows, Mac, iPadOS, ChromeOS.;Download Respondus LockDown Browser: Navigate to the download page, select 'Install Now', choose location, and run installer.;Download the Respondus LockDown Browser app for iPad: Open App Store, search for 'LockDown Browser', and select Get.;Take the Respondus Tech Check Quiz: Navigate to the quiz course, log in with Canvas credentials, enroll, and take the quiz.;Take the test on a computer: Start LockDown Browser, log in to Canvas, and navigate to the exam.;Take the test on an iPad: Open the app, set up for Northeastern University, authenticate, and start the test.;Guidelines: Test-taking guidelines and Respondus Monitor Webcam guidelines.;Help: Live chat and Troubleshooting and additional help.
